query:
UPDATE worker_commands SET
                status = CASE WHEN retry_count >= max_retries THEN 'failed' ELSE 'pending' END,
                retry_count = retry_count + 1,
                error_message = $2,
                completed_ts = CASE WHEN retry_count >= max_retries THEN $3::BIGINT ELSE NULL END
            WHERE command_id = $1
